title: Burning Feet in the Field: 8 Herbal Remedies for Soldiers
description: Calendula officinalis creams are a popular natural remedy for burning feet, and it's not hard to see why. This plant-based cream contains properties like anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agents, which help to soothe and calm irritated skin. The cream's main constituents, including triterpenoid saponins and flavonoids, work together to reduce redness and swelling, while also promoting wound healing and tissue repair.
